name: Rochelle Walensky
role: Director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
bio: An American physician and scientist who served as the 19th Director of the CDC from 2021 to 2023.
_evidence: As the head of the CDC, she was the primary federal authority issuing guidance on mask mandates and public health safety protocols during 2021.

name: Joe Biden
bio: The 46th President of the United States, serving during the height of the 2021 COVID-19 pandemic response.
_evidence: He set the federal tone for mask-wearing and attempted to implement federal mandates for federal employees and contractors, shaping the national debate.

name: Ron DeSantis
bio: The 46th Governor of Florida, known for his vocal opposition to federal and local COVID-19 mitigation mandates.
_evidence: He was a leading figure in the legal and political conflict against mask mandates, issuing executive orders to ban school mask requirements.
